mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_account as adminAccount, admin_password as adminPassword, admin_avatar as adminAvatar, admin_status as adminStatus, create_time as createTime FROM admin WHERE admin_account = #{adminAccount}
SELECT id, admin_account as adminAccount, admin_password as adminPassword, admin_avatar as adminAvatar, admin_status as adminStatus, create_time as createTime FROM admin WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin (admin_account, admin_password, admin_avatar, admin_status, create_time) VALUES (#{adminAccount}, #{adminPassword}, #{adminAvatar}, #{adminStatus}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_account as adminAccount, admin_password as adminPassword, admin_avatar as adminAvatar, admin_status as adminStatus, create_time as createTime FROM admin ORDER BY create_time DESC
